Class EggBoxMonster

java.lang.Object
com.glisterbyte.singingmonsters.main.monster.AbstractMonster
com.glisterbyte.singingmonsters.main.monster.Monster
com.glisterbyte.singingmonsters.main.monster.eggbox.EggBoxMonster
All Implemented Interfaces:
HasClient, HasSfsData, Positioned, ControllableMonster, ControllableEggBoxMonster, ReadableEggBoxMonster, ReadableMonster
public class EggBoxMonster extends Monster implements ReadableEggBoxMonster, ControllableEggBoxMonster
